caption: Ah yes, nothing captures the poetry of autumn quite like sitting in traffic under some leaves.

facts.summary: Cars drive down an autumn boulevard lined with golden trees.

caption: Everyone stuck in traffic pretending they don't notice the trees putting on the best show of the year.

facts.summary: A dog fetches a stick on a sunny beach.

facts.summary: A dog fetches a stick on a sunny beach.

caption: Yes, throw the stick again. This is definitely a mystery worth solving for the thirtieth time today.

facts.summary: A dog fetches a stick on a sunny beach.

caption: Legacy retriever service with 100% uptime and a single hard-coded API: THROW → FETCH → REPEAT.

facts.summary: A dog fetches a stick on a sunny beach.

caption: Somewhere a dog just experienced the greatest single moment of the entire year, again.
